chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S- 51 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For hearing of main case. Mrs. Farzana (Bhatti) Makwal, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State a/w respondent No.1 (complainant). Date of Hearing & Order: 13-11-2023 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.- With the consent, this Crl. Transfer Application is allowed. Sessions Case No. 73 of 2022 re: State-Versus Mumtaz Alam & others, arising out of Crime No.21 of 2022, registered at P.S, Khambhra for offence under Section 23 A of SAA, 2013 is withdrawn from the file of learned Additional Sessions Judge/MCTC, Ubauro and transferred to the Court of learned Additional Sessions Judge-II, Mirpur Mathelo for its disposal in accordance with law. This Crl. Transfer Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
